summary: Iteration 122: Tested Continuity Director storyboard architecture upgrade. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified login flow, studio page loading at /marketing/studio?mode=directed, storyboard editor with 15 panels, expand/collapse buttons, AI Facilitator toggle, and 6-frame per panel structure. All new storyboard functions (_generate_shot_briefs, _build_identity_prompt, generate_all_panels) import correctly. Backend endpoints remain functional after changes.
critical_code_review_comments: New _generate_shot_briefs() function uses Claude to pre-plan 6 frames per scene with spatial continuity and per-character positioning
_build_identity_prompt() creates identity-first prompts for Gemini with character identity FIRST, scene instruction SECOND
_analyze_avatars_with_vision() now returns structured Identity Cards with species, body_type, locomotion, immutable_traits, and prohibitions
Parallelism increased from 2→4 scenes and 3→6 frames concurrent (scene_semaphore=4, frame_sem=6)
FRAME_TYPES constant defines 6 pages per scene: Pagina 1-6 (Opening, Rising Action, Key Action, Reaction, Consequence, Closing)
generate_all_panels() now accepts identity_cards parameter and generates shot briefs before frame generation
Storyboard router properly imports and uses identity_cards from production_design or generates them on-the-fly
All existing studio endpoints remain functional after storyboard architecture changes
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user test@agentflow.com and ADAO E EVA BIBLIZOO project
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 122 complete. Continuity Director storyboard architecture upgrade verified. Test credentials: test@agentflow.com / password123. New storyboard pipeline: 1) Identity Cards from avatar analysis, 2) Shot Briefs from Claude (6 frames per scene), 3) Frame generation via Gemini with identity-first prompts. Parallelism: 4 scenes × 6 frames = 24 concurrent. ADAO E EVA BIBLIZOO project has 15 panels with 6 frames each. All studio endpoints working: /api/studio/projects, /api/studio/projects/{id}/storyboard, /api/studio/voices, /api/studio/music-library, /api/studio/cache/stats, /api/studio/voice-preview.

backend_tests.storyboard_frame_types_defined: PASS - FRAME_TYPES has 6 frames with label, order, prompt
backend_tests.storyboard_panels_have_frames: PASS - Panels have frames array with 6 frames
